title: Nellayila Mannedutha Lyrics Machakaaran
stanzas: <div>Nellayila Mannedutha Song Lyrics Machakaaran

Ayyanaaru koyilula
aaluyara kudhiraiyamma
kuthirayathaan nendhuvida
singam onnu vandhathammaa

maanaminnu vandhathunnaa
maar nimirum vamsamaiyyaa
oorukkoru thevayinnaa
uyir kodukkum nenjamaiyyaa

parakkudhu paar kudhira
edhir pattathellaam sedhara
ayyaa mugam malara
adi aadungadi adhira

nellayila manneduthaa
madhurayila ponneduthaa
machakkaaran machakkaaran

thiruvizhavil thaerilutha
thaer maraivil kaiyilutha
machakkaaran machakkaaran

hey sadaamudi sadaamudi
vachchakkaaran
hey adaavadi thadaaladi
machakkaaran
nellayila manneduthaa
madhurayila ponneduthaa
machakkaaran machakkaaran

thiruvizhavil thaerilutha
thaer maraivil kaiyilutha
machakkaaran machakkaaran

enga ooru dhevathaiku parisam poda
vaaravan thaan
hey sathiyama ulagathula
machakkaaran

rendu moonu machinichi
thulli odum veettukkula.
hey marumaganaa ponavanthan
machakkaaran

kaivala vaangi thandhu
kaalampoora kadanum solli
enkitta sinuthavanthaan
machakkaaran di

koattaaru aruvikkulla
thundu katti ponavandhan.
thaavani katti vandhaa
machakkaaran adi

hey modapudi kedapudi
viththakkaaran
hey vidapottu kodapottu
vachchakkaaran

nellayila manneduthaa
madhurayila ponneduthaa
machakkaaran machakkaaran

thiruvizhavil thaerilutha
thaer maraivil kaiyilutha
machakkaaran machakkaaran

undivilla kondu vandhu
uthu uthu kuriyum vachu
retta puraa suttavanthaan
machakkaaran

othasollu sonnaa adhu
ooradangu sattamiyyaa
enga saami ayyaavumthaan
machakkaaran

karavetti kattaamale
kachikulla kaalavachi
councilar aanavandhaan
machakkaaran di

ettana kaasillaama
seettaatathil kayya vachi
enkooda allunavan
machakkaran di

kondayila pooveduthu
vachchakkaaran
ye sandayila silledukkum
machakkaaran

ellayila manneduthaa
madhurayila ponneduthaa
machakkaaran machakkaaran

thiruvizhavil thaerilutha
thaer maraivil kaiyilutha
machakkaaran machakkaaran

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nellayila Mannedutha'?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, beautifully expressed through its lyrics by Pa Vijay.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Machakaaran'?

In Machakaaran, this song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Roshini and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his unique musical style.

When was 'Nellayila Mannedutha' released?

The song was released on November 8, 2007, as part of the Machakaaran soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Nellayila Mannedutha', the song encapsulates the romantic essence of the film Machakaaran. The lyrics beautifully express feelings of love and longing, creating a nostalgic atmosphere. Roshini's soulful rendition, combined with Yuvan's melodic composition, evokes a sense of happiness and warmth. This track is a perfect accompaniment for moments of celebration and reflection on love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nellayila Mannedutha from the Machakaaran movie is a delightful melody that captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With Roshini's enchanting vocals paired with Yuvan's captivating music, this song is sure to resonate with listeners. Experience the magic of Tamil cinema through this beautiful track that evokes heartfelt emotions.
stanzaMeanings: In the temple of Ayyanar, the horse is dancing, and the lion has come to join the celebration.
When pride comes, it brings along a heart that gives life to the needs of the village.
The horse is jumping, and everything is in place; the face of the lord is blooming, and the dance is lively.
In Nellai, there is a celebration; in Madurai, there is a gathering; Machakaaran, Machakaaran.
In the festival, the chariot is moving; in the temple, it is in hand; Machakaaran, Machakaaran.
Hey, Sadaamudi, Sadaamudi, the one who has come; hey, Adaavadi, Thadaaladi, Machakaaran, in Nellai, there is a celebration; in Madurai, there is a gathering; Machakaaran, Machakaaran.
In the festival, the chariot is moving; in the temple, it is in hand; Machakaaran, Machakaaran.
The one who brings offerings to our village deity is the one who is true; hey, truly, in this world, Machakaaran.
In the house, two or three are jumping around; hey, the one who is the son-in-law, Machakaaran.
He brought the offering and said it was for the festival; he is the one who has come to us, Machakaaran.
The one who tied the bundle in the knife's grip has come; if the offering comes, Machakaaran will dance.
Hey, the one who is mischievous and playful; hey, the one who is clever and crafty, has come.
In Nellai, there is a celebration; in Madurai, there is a gathering; Machakaaran, Machakaaran.
In the festival, the chariot is moving; in the temple, it is in hand; Machakaaran, Machakaaran.
He came with nothing and made a mess; he is the one who has come to stir things up, Machakaaran.
If I say something, it becomes a law in the village; our lord is also Machakaaran.
Without tying the knot, he came to the council; he is the one who has come, Machakaaran.
How much money is there? He is the one who has come to take it all, Machakaaran.
In the flower basket, he has come; he is the one who brings joy, Machakaaran.
In Nellai, there is a celebration; in Madurai, there is a gathering; Machakaaran, Machakaaran.
In the festival, the chariot is moving; in the temple, it is in hand; Machakaaran, Machakaaran.
